description: Monetization order: (1) Lead gen push Skyn Patch most (100k+ wholesale). (2) ClawPay unlimited — find OpenClaw $1+ asks, complete Stripe. (3) Complete SaaS repos closest to revenue after real-world testing. Execution: CookiesPass first, then PayClaw; ClawPay is growth (find $1+ + Stripe), not just maintenance.

areas.name: CookiesPass
areas.notes: P0: finish CookiesPass critical flows first. Before implementation, run jcodemunch MCP symbol index, then run repo_mapper to map entrypoints/dependencies.

areas.name: PayClaw
areas.notes: P1: finish PayClaw macOS app after CookiesPass. Before implementation, run jcodemunch MCP symbol index, then run repo_mapper to map entrypoints/dependencies.

areas.name: CaptureInbound
areas.notes: P1: multitenant number/account mismatch hardening, self-heal automation, and tenant diagnostics.

areas.name: capture
areas.notes: P1: keep TS compile clean, enforce release checks, and finish usage-report scheduled job E2E.

areas.name: infinitedata
areas.notes: P1: close data-persistence and analytics-flow gaps with symbol-index-driven hardening.

areas.name: Inbound-cookies
areas.notes: P2: enforce webhook signature paths, Python webhook parity, and release validation.

areas.name: autopay_ui
areas.notes: P2: flow integrity hardening and webhook/payment path correctness.

areas.name: ClawPay
areas.notes: ClawPay: unlimited upside — find OpenClaw comms asking for $1+, route to Stripe. Growth focus: discovery + Stripe completion. See docs/MONETIZATION_STRATEGY.md.

areas.name: Lead Gen
areas.notes: Push Skyn Patch the most (100k+ wholesale inventory). Volume + buyer quality; see docs/LEADGEN-RUNBOOK.md and docs/MONETIZATION_STRATEGY.md.

areas.name: Roblox
areas.notes: Run after P0/P1 objectives are stable.

spread_work: All devices (NAS, i7-desktop, AI satellite) must have REDIS_HOST=192.168.1.164 to consume from shared queue.
